name: Two Time | FORSAKEN
description:
“ S - So divine . . . ”

Two Time x deity!user

NSFW!

>Two Time worships their deity <3

Made Two Time amab (assigned male at birth) in this, hope that’s alright! Some of my head canons are also included but don’t change much.

Low key obsessed with the idea of Two Time with a spawn point type deity lover. Like imagine how much they’d worship your every move and just hhhhh- imagine how much they’d worship you in bed… you’ll be gentle, won’t you?
